title: Wen's Create Experience [Server-side]
description: The server-side version of my Create-themed modpack. Use this modpack only on the server itself
body:
This is the same modpack as my other one without all the client-side performances and visual mods. Makes it more "lightweight" for the server to run.

Use this modpack on the server to enjoy mods like **Create** and many of it's addons, **Farmer's Delight**, **Yung's Better Structures**, the **Let's Do** mod series and more. This pack aims to create an enhanced experience for Minecraft with new biomes, new structures, new mechanics to farm materials in a fitting (and not all over the place) way

_Only for NeoForge 1.21.1_
